transcript.text:

10 servings of Daechang (beef large intestines) and 2 servings of Gopchang (beef small intestines), etc

[Daechange (beef large intestines)]

[Gopchang & Daechang]
Is that it?
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some Gopchang today
I was wondering which location to go to
And thought of a place that one of a friend recommended
So I'm here at Apgujeong
Ta-da Here

Hello

200g per serving
So let's just do 2kg for now
Let's do 10 servings of gopchang,
and 2 servings of makchang (beef abomasum)
2 people set a record at our restaurant by eating 2 grills worth
16 servings
16 servings of gopchang?
Between 2 people

[Gopchang (beef small intestines)]
[Seasoning powder]

Thank you

That looks delicious
This usually comes with chives

[It's usually like this]

Liver first I love it
That's amazing It doesn't have a smell to it

The fillings
So savory
It's filled with fat
If it's too soft, you don't get the chewy taste

This one is perfect
This time,
Dip in ssamjang (seasoning chili paste) I wonder if it's good

The heart tastes best eaten right away

The heart is amazing

That tastes amazing
It just melts in my mouth
Let's cut it up this time
All cut up

3 pieces at once
The dipping sauce is tasty
I didn't know this but having the heart cut up into chunks like this
makes it feel very different
It just adds crunchy texture to it
Beef heart is amazing

I'm going to have to eat it like this from now
4 pieces this time
Can't forget about the potatoes
Buckwheat curd with vegetables

Oh no~
Not too many though
I can kinda taste it
It's good but I can taste the cucumbers
Dip it

Thank you

It's getting better with every bite It's full of flavor

I got some on my hair

Check it out

It's delicious

Thank you

Thank you

It's really good

Amazing

Thank you

It's okay
